note: LT38 live-only profile composed from the unified DCL scaffold plus a forced-Death/fixed-Raise diagnostic. It is safe only with the audited Death-neutralized action data and must not be promoted as balance policy.

resolutions.DclHealingFormula: if(action.abilityId == 5, 111, if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbed, dcl.magicAmount, if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmount), dcl.oldCredit)))
resolutions.DclPreviewHealingFormula: if(action.abilityId == 5, 111, if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbed, dcl.magicAmount, if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0)))
